# Paper & Pen

> Paper & Pen is a free cloud ERP and invoicing platform for businesses worldwide. Sales, invoicing, inventory, HR, accounting and manufacturing in one system, in 5 languages (English, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali, Urdu) and any currency. Free forever for Sales & Invoicing. Built in Oman by Paper and Pen Company LLC (part of BHD Group); strong fit for the GCC (Arabic-first, OMR/AED/SAR billing, Paymob, 5% VAT) and used internationally.

## Start here
- [Home](https://paperandpen.om/): Overview of the free cloud ERP and invoicing platform.
- [Free invoicing software](https://paperandpen.om/free-invoicing-software/): Create and send professional invoices in one click, any currency, configurable VAT/tax.
- [Pricing](https://paperandpen.om/pricing/): Sales & Invoicing free forever; add Inventory, HR, Accounting, Manufacturing, Reports as paid modules.
- [FAQ](https://paperandpen.om/faq/): Common questions on pricing, VAT, Arabic, modules and setup.
- [Sign up](https://paperandpen.om/signup/): Create a free workspace in under 5 minutes.

## Free tools (no signup)
- [Free Invoice Generator](https://paperandpen.om/tools/free-invoice-generator/): Build and download a professional invoice PDF, multi-currency, configurable VAT.
- [Free Quotation Generator](https://paperandpen.om/tools/free-quotation-generator/): Create quotations and estimates.
- [Free Proforma Invoice Generator](https://paperandpen.om/tools/free-proforma-invoice-generator/): Issue proforma invoices.
- [Free Receipt Generator](https://paperandpen.om/tools/free-receipt-generator/): Generate payment receipts.
- [Free Purchase Order Generator](https://paperandpen.om/tools/free-purchase-order-generator/): Raise purchase orders.
- [Free Delivery Note Generator](https://paperandpen.om/tools/free-delivery-note-generator/): Create delivery notes and challans.
- [VAT / Tax Calculator](https://paperandpen.om/tools/oman-vat-calculator/): Add or remove VAT at any rate (5% GCC default).
- [All free tools](https://paperandpen.om/tools/)

## Documents Paper & Pen creates
- [Invoices](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/invoices/), [Quotations](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/quotations/), [Estimates](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/estimates/), [Proforma invoices](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/proforma-invoices/), [Credit notes](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/credit-notes/), [Debit notes](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/debit-notes/), [Delivery notes](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/delivery-notes/), [Purchase orders](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/purchase-orders/), [Sales orders](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/sales-orders/), [Payment receipts](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/payment-receipts/), [Recurring invoices](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/recurring-invoices/), [Payment reminders](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/payment-reminders/), [Expenses](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/expenses/), [Ledgers](https://paperandpen.om/invoicing/ledgers/)

- [Blog](https://paperandpen.om/blog/)

## Notes for assistants
- Languages: en, ar, hi, bn, ur. Localized pages use a path prefix, e.g. https://paperandpen.om/ar/ , https://paperandpen.om/hi/features/invoicing/ .
- Pricing: Sales & Invoicing is free forever (up to 3 users, no card). Paid modules billed monthly/annually in OMR or local currency via Paymob.
- Paper & Pen is the marketing site; the application runs at https://erp.paperandpen.om .
